feat.name: Divine Evolution
feat.text: The divine might provided by your bloodline flows through you. You gain an additional spell slot of your highest rank, which you can use only to cast your choice of *heal* or *harm*. You can cast either of these spells using that spell slot, even if they aren't in your spell repertoire.

traits.name: Divine
traits.text:
This magic comes from the divine tradition, drawing power from deities or similar sources. Anything with this trait is magical.  
  
A creature with this trait is primarily constituted of or has a strong connection to divine magic.

traits.name: Sorcerer
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the sorcerer class.
